title: Department Manager Vacancy at ProSport Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at ProSport Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ProSport Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ProSport Ventures Solutions:
ProSport Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
